description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the lechten/emacs-tex-org:v2 Docker image. Define a deploy stage with a pages job that runs the before_script commands `git submodule sync --recursive` and `git submodule update --init --recursive`, then executes `emacs --batch --load elisp/publish.el --funcall org-publish-all`. The pages job should publish the `public/` directory as a GitLab Pages artifact and only run when the commit ref name equals the default branch.
